appSettingsDialogHint: Theme, defaults, engines, diagnostics, and backup in one place.
appSettingsHotkeyPasteUrlGlobal: Paste URL (when focus is not in a text field)
appSettingsOpenDownloadsTab: Open Downloads tab for more options
appSettingsResetConfirmHint: Click again to reset all settings (window positions are kept).
appSettingsSectionHintDefaults: Download folder and batch export output directory.
appSettingsSectionHintDependencies: Engine paths, update check, owner-smoke hub (preview + copy bundle), and NVENC/VAAPI/packaged checklists.
appSettingsOwnerSmokeIntro: Copies one checklist with a version/build header: theme, HiDPI, HW, scenarios, packaged smoke for your OS, scheduler, and (on Windows) Explorer shell. Checklist body is in Support ZIP (ownerManualSmoke:).
appSettingsOwnerSmokeCopyFailed: Could not copy — select text manually.
appSettingsOwnerSmokePreviewHint: Expand the blocks below — the same steps are included in “Copy full bundle” and Support ZIP (ownerManualSmoke:).
appSettingsHwManualSmokeIntro: Real GPU runs are not automated in CI. Check steps here or copy the checklist for your report (also in Support ZIP as hwManualSmoke:).
appSettingsHwManualSmokeOwnerBundleHint: Full bundle (HiDPI, packaged, scenarios, scheduler, Win shell): Owner manual smoke block above → Copy full bundle (ownerManualSmoke:).
appSettingsPackagedSmokeOwnerBundleHint: This packaged checklist is included in ownerManualSmoke: — use Copy full bundle in Owner manual smoke above.
appSettingsHidpiOwnerBundleHint: HiDPI steps are in ownerManualSmoke: — Owner manual smoke above → Copy full bundle.
appSettingsThemeOwnerBundleHint: Theme steps are in ownerManualSmoke: — Owner manual smoke above → Copy full bundle.
appSettingsHwManualSmokeCopyFailed: Copy failed — select the text manually.
appSettingsHwManualSmokePrimaryWin: On this OS the Windows — NVENC section is listed first.
appSettingsHwManualSmokePrimaryLinux: On this OS the Linux — VAAPI section is listed first.
appSettingsHwManualSmokePrimaryOther: macOS: run both sections or VideoToolbox separately; pick what matches your export path.
appSettingsWinPackagedSmokeIntro: After npm run pack:dir, run dist/win-unpacked/FluxAlloy.exe and complete the steps. Automated checks: verify:win-unpacked and smoke:packaged-release. See docs/RELEASE.md §4.
appSettingsWinPackagedSmokeCopyFailed: Copy failed — select the text manually.
appSettingsLinuxPackagedSmokeIntro: After npm run pack:linux:dir, run dist/linux-unpacked/fluxalloy or FluxAlloy and complete the steps. Automated layout check: verify:linux-unpacked. See docs/RELEASE.md §4.1.
appSettingsLinuxPackagedSmokeCopyFailed: Copy failed — select the text manually.
appSettingsMacosPackagedSmokeIntro: After npm run pack:mac:dir, open dist/mac-arm64/FluxAlloy.app and complete the steps. Automated layout check: verify:mac-unpacked. See docs/RELEASE.md §4.2.
appSettingsMacosPackagedSmokeCopyFailed: Copy failed — select the text manually.
appSettingsSectionHintGeneral: Language, theme, display scale (HiDPI), and URL paste behavior.
appSettingsHidpiActiveTier: Active CSS rules for {percent}% (@{dpi}dpi block in main.css)
appSettingsHidpiManualHint: In Settings → Display → Scale, try 100, 125, 150, and 200%, restart FluxAlloy, and confirm text and buttons are not clipped.
appSettingsHidpiCheckEditor: Editor — top bar, preview, timeline, FFmpeg rail;
appSettingsHidpiCheckDownloads: Downloads tab — URL bar, queue table, lower panels;
appSettingsSectionHintHotkeys: Accelerators from the main menu (may differ on macOS).
appSettingsSectionHintLogs: Open logs, create a support archive, or open About for more tools.
appSettingsSectionHintReset: Export or import settings.json, or reset to factory defaults.
appSettingsThemeManualHint: Switch dark, light, and match system in Settings → General or View → Theme; with match system, change the OS theme and confirm FluxAlloy follows without restart.
appSettingsThemeCheckAccent: primary buttons and accent links — readable text contrast on accent (especially dark theme);
appSettingsThemeCheckFocus: inputs, selects, and buttons — visible focus ring on Tab;
appSettingsThemeCheckDisabled: disabled buttons and fields — muted but still distinguishable;
appSettingsThemeCheckModals: Settings and About modals — backdrop and shadows without muddy black;
appSettingsThemeCheckWorkflow: Service → scenario builder / planner — download/process/save nodes on tokens, labels not clipped;
appSettingsThemeCheckDownloadsPopout: Downloads pop-out — same theme as the main window;
appSettingsThemeCheckInspector: Inspector window — background and topbar match the editor.
settingsEnginesCheckUpdatesTooltip: Compare yt-dlp and FFmpeg versions with GitHub and download to app-data/bin when newer
appSettingsExplorerMenuHint: Add Open in FluxAlloy and Quick MP4 for video files (current user, HKCU). Portable builds: register manually.
appSettingsExplorerMenuRegisteredStatus: Menu entries are registered for video extensions
appSettingsOpenWithHint: Adds FluxAlloy to the Open with list for video files (HKCU). Does not set a default app — use Windows Settings for that.
appSettingsOpenWithRegisteredStatus: FluxAlloy is listed in Open with for video extensions
